summary: Tested BidBlitz Pay bug fixes and Request Money feature. Backend: 15/15 tests PASSED. Frontend: All 5 bug fixes verified, Request Money feature working.

backend_tests.test_send_money_accepts_email: PASS - Accepts email format, returns 404 for nonexistent
backend_tests.test_send_money_accepts_customer_id: PASS - Accepts customer ID format, returns 404 for nonexistent
backend_tests.test_create_payment_request_endpoint_exi: PASS - POST /api/bidblitz-pay/request-money creates request with QR
backend_tests.test_create_request_returns_qr_code: PASS - Returns base64 PNG QR code with BIDBLITZ-REQ: prefix
backend_tests.test_get_nonexistent_request_returns_404: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid request ID
backend_tests.test_pay_nonexistent_request_returns_404: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid request ID
backend_tests.test_my_requests_contains_created_reques: PASS - Created requests appear in list
backend_tests.test_api_accepts_german_error_messages: PASS - API returns German error messages

bug_fix_1_customer_id.description: Send Money tab shows 'Empfänger (Kundennummer oder E-Mail)' label and 'Kundennummer oder E-Mail' placeholder

bug_fix_2_webauthn.description: BiometricAuth.js has getPublicKey fallback to attestationObject (Line 118-128)

bug_fix_3_topup_buttons.description: Quick amount buttons (€5, €10, €20, €50) are present in Top Up tab

bug_fix_4_languages.description: 16 languages available in dropdown: de, en, fr, es, tr, ar, it, pt, nl, pl, ru, zh, ja, ko, el, sq

bug_fix_5_mobile_security.description: Tab navigation has overflow-x-auto, Security tab accessible and clickable on mobile

new_feature_request_money.description: Request Money tab with QR-Code erstellen button, form for amount and description

send_money_customer_id.description: Send money now accepts both Kundennummer (customer ID) and E-Mail. Backend searches by email first, then by user ID, then case-insensitive ID.

webauthn_getpublickey_fallback.description: BiometricAuth.js Line 118-128: If getPublicKey() is not available, falls back to attestationObject

topup_quick_buttons.description: Quick amount buttons €5, €10, €20, €50 are clickable (not disabled by default)

language_menu_16_languages.description: 16 languages available: Deutsch, English, Français, Español, Türkçe, العربية, Italiano, Português, Nederlands, Polski, Русский, 中文, 日本語, 한국어, Ελληνικά, Shqip

mobile_security_tab.description: Tab navigation is horizontally scrollable on mobile, Security tab is visible and clickable

endpoints: POST /api/bidblitz-pay/request-money - Creates payment request with QR code
request_money_feature.ui: New 'Anfordern' tab with amount input, description, and QR-Code erstellen button

critical_code_review_comments: Send money endpoint (Line 219-244) properly searches by email first, then by user ID, then case-insensitive ID
Request money creates QR with BIDBLITZ-REQ: prefix for easy identification
Pay request blocks self-payment and checks expiry before processing
BiometricAuth.js has proper fallback for getPublicKey() to attestationObject
Tab navigation uses overflow-x-auto and flex-shrink-0 for proper mobile scrolling
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: BidBlitz Pay bug fixes and Request Money feature fully tested. All 5 reported bugs fixed: 1) Send money accepts Kundennummer or E-Mail, 2) WebAuthn getPublicKey has fallback, 3) Quick buttons clickable, 4) 16 languages available, 5) Security tab accessible on mobile. New Request Money feature working with QR code generation. Route is /pay or /wallet (not /bidblitz-pay). Test credentials: admin@bidblitz.ae / Admin123!
